scripts.build: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m ruff check backend/src" "npm run build --prefix frontend"
scripts.lint: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m ruff check backend/src" "npm run lint --prefix frontend"
scripts.format: .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m ruff format backend/src && cd frontend && npm run format
scripts.format:check: .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m ruff format --check backend/src && cd frontend && npm run format:check
scripts.test: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest backend/tests -q" "npm run test --prefix frontend"
